specs.title: VPS only, new customer → invoice PAID, VPS service present
VPS only, existing customer → service appears in dashboard
VPS + register domain, existing customer → both items ordered
VPS + transfer domain, existing customer → both items ordered
existing client buys VPS → service appears in dashboard list
register domain (new customer): order + invoice PAID, domain visible with a valid status
transfer domain (existing customer): order + invoice PAID, domain record present
duplicate domain registration is rejected system-wide
VPS does not auto-activate (Hetzner module is a stub) — stays PROVISIONING
adding funds credits the wallet and creates a PAID deposit invoice (ledger entry)
wallet balance is reflected by the profile endpoint after a deposit
multiple deposits accumulate in the wallet

suites.title: Category 7 — Invoice Automation (cron pays from wallet)

specs.title: cron auto-pays a due invoice from wallet balance: invoice PAID, balance reduced, transaction recorded
cron reports the automatic payment attempt in billingMaintenance result
cron executes successfully and returns valid ran/skipped arrays
every expected job appears in ran or skipped
no cron job reports a failed status
billingMaintenance and ticketsClose always run (not throttled)
billingMaintenance result exposes the automation summary keys
public cron endpoint rejects a missing/invalid secret
hosting order page renders the checkout form and real payment gateways
order pages load without server errors for hosting, VPS and domain products
storefront exposes the configured live gateways
admin gateway settings list every method with an enabled flag
SANDBOX → invoice PAID
CREDIT_CARD (Mollie) → invoice PENDING with a hosted-checkout redirect
PAYPAL → invoice PENDING with a PayPal approval redirect
SEPA (Mollie direct debit) → payment initiated with a transaction
BANK_TRANSFER → invoice stays PENDING with a manual transaction
